app.title: ArtPipeline Studio
app.subtitle: KEYLE· Art Pipeline
form.subject: Description
form.enabledHint: If unchecked, you can still generate via right-click; category batch only includes enabled assets
form.basicTabDesc: Filename, size, notes, and generation model — controls how this asset joins batch runs.
form.categoryTabDesc: Paths, default checkpoint, and shared prompts — inherited defaults for assets in this category.
form.aiTabDesc: Powered by DeepSeek — write prompts, refine workflows, or configure multiple fields in one chat.
form.checkpointCloudHint: Cloud models use the cloud: prefix; selectable without ComfyUI online.
form.comfyUrlHint: Connect to ComfyUI, list local checkpoints, and submit ComfyUI jobs
form.promptSegmentsHint: (ComfyUI) Segments merge at generation. SDXL: G = prefix + subject + scene; L = subject + scene + light.
form.positivePrefixPlaceholder: Quality & style tags, e.g. masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 8k, RAW photo
form.positiveSubjectPlaceholder: Main subject & foreground, e.g. vintage revolver on crushed burgundy velvet, bronze engravings, crimson cylinder glow, purple barrel smoke
form.positiveScenePlaceholder: Background & props; leave empty if not needed. e.g. antique roulette wheel, skull tarot cards, brass coins, dripping candles
form.positiveLightPlaceholder: Lighting, palette, materials, e.g. low-key chiaroscuro, dark maroon and purple palette, bokeh, hyperrealistic textures
form.positiveMergedPlaceholder: Shows merged text after you fill the four segments; or use AI Write prompts to generate all segments
form.negativePlaceholder: Avoid artifacts & wrong styles, e.g. cartoon, anime, blurry, watermark, bright background, text, signature
form.comfyTabDesc: Four-segment prompts and workflow JSON; generation mode selects text-to-image, img2img, or editing.
form.genModeTextToImageDesc: Generate from text only; no reference image.
form.genModeImageToImageDesc: Use a reference image; redraw from your prompt with adjustable strength.
form.genModeImageEditDesc: Edit an existing image (default: source) from your prompt.
form.refImagePlaceholder: Relative to ArtPipeline or absolute path
form.cloudStrengthHint: For Image-to-Image / Image Editing; higher = more change.
form.img2imgHint: Image-to-Image: uploads the reference to ComfyUI and redraws by denoise. Load an img2img workflow template.
form.redrawHint: Image Editing: uses inbox as base (source if no inbox); size follows base; output goes to inbox only. denoise ~0.35–0.55.
form.cloudPromptHint: Cloud APIs use a single prompt; no four-segment split or workflow JSON.
form.cloudApiSectionDesc: Connect third-party APIs alongside local ComfyUI models. Fill in keys and use Test connection to verify.
form.cloudMaxConcurrentHint: Max parallel cloud jobs; Hunyuan accounts may allow fewer (capped per provider).
form.workflowPresetIntro: Presets define how ComfyUI samples (single pass / dual CLIP / two-pass / img2img). Load, then save the workflow before generation.
form.settingsPathsDesc: Set your game project and ArtPipeline roots. Leave log directory empty for the system default.
form.settingsComfyDesc: Connect to local ComfyUI and set global sampling defaults (workflows may override).
form.settingsAiDesc: DeepSeek powers prompt writing, refinement, and workflow suggestions. Keys stay in local config only.
form.settingsFootHint: Click Save after changes. Paths and API keys are stored locally in pipeline_config.
form.logDirHint: Leave empty for system default ({path}); writes studio.log
ai.hint.prompt: Generate or rewrite prompts in four segments (prefix / subject / scene / light) plus subject
ai.hint.refine: Refine four-segment prompts; preserve unchanged segments when possible
ai.hint.workflow: Discuss ComfyUI workflow structure; writes JSON only when needed
ai.hint.basic: Fill or edit Basic Info: subject, filename, category, size, seed, enabled, remove-bg, checkpoint
ai.hint.free: Default mode: configure basic info, category settings, prompts, gen mode, and workflow in one message
ai.placeholder.prompt: Describe the icon you want, e.g. a gambler avatar with golden lucky glow
ai.placeholder.refine: What to change, e.g. larger subject, remove white background, green poison FX
ai.placeholder.workflow: e.g. change sampler to euler, steps to 28, or which nodes to edit
ai.placeholder.basic: e.g. subject to "Luck dice · gold glow", size 128×128, enable asset, remove bg
ai.placeholder.free: e.g. set subject and prompts for a luck dice icon, GII checkpoint, 128×128, enable remove-bg
ai.empty.prompt: Describe your asset; AI will draft ComfyUI prompts using category and size
ai.empty.refine: Tell AI what to adjust: composition, effects, negatives, description
ai.empty.workflow: Describe workflow changes; AI usually edits prompts unless you ask otherwise
ai.empty.basic: Describe basic info to write; AI saves to config (see Basic Info tab)
ai.empty.free: Describe what to configure; AI can fill Basic Info, Category, Prompts, and Workflow tabs at once
ai.selectAssetFirst: Select an asset on the left first
ai.failedClickHint: Click to restore the message in the input box
ai.composeHint: Enter send · Shift+Enter newline · chat kept per asset and mode
log.fabTitle: Drag to move · click to open logs
log.title: Run log
dlg.categoryCheckpointHint: ComfyUI checkpoint used as the default for assets in this category
dlg.noCheckpoints: No checkpoints found — check ComfyUI URL
dlg.importEmpty: No files selected. PNG / JPG / WebP — assets are created from filenames and copied to inbox
dlg.importHint: Images are saved as PNG to source and inbox; duplicate filenames are skipped
dlg.importHintRedraw: Redraw mode: images go to inbox only (source untouched); generation redraws into inbox
dlg.newAssetHint: Creates config only — does not call ComfyUI. Generate manually after filling prompts.
dlg.renameAssetHint: Renames existing PNG files in source, inbox, and Unity folders together
path.chip.inbox.ok: inbox · matches source (no post-process or restored)
path.chip.engine.outdated: engine · out of sync with inbox, re-export needed
layer.subject: · subject
toast.invalidSize: Size must be an integer between 32 and 4096
toast.inboxFromSource: Inbox was empty — copied from source and ready to edit
toast.apiRouteMissingRestart: API route not loaded — restart ArtPipeline Studio and try again
toast.jobEndedCheckLogs: Task finished — check the log for details
toast.aiReplyOnly: AI replied; no config fields were changed
confirm.renameOverwrite.title: Target filename already exists
confirm.renameOverwrite.message: "{name}" already has PNG files in source / inbox / engine (often left after deleting another asset). Overwrite and rename?
confirm.renameOverwrite.detailHint: Overwrite removes files at the target paths, then renames this asset's files to that name
confirm.deleteAsset.title: Delete asset
confirm.deleteAsset.detailConfig: Removes this asset's config and workflow references
confirm.deleteAsset.detailFiles: PNG files on disk will not be deleted
confirm.moveAsset.title: Move to another category
confirm.moveAsset.detailWarning: Existing PNG files will be moved in source, inbox, and engine directories
confirm.moveAsset.detailCaution: Proceed with care: the operation is cancelled if a same-named file already exists at the destination
toast.assetDragHint: Drag to a category on the left to move
confirm.deleteCategory.title: Delete category
confirm.deleteCategory.detailConfig: Removes this category and all asset configs in it
confirm.deleteCategory.detailFiles: PNG files on disk will not be deleted
pp.title: Post-process
pp.shortcuts: Del delete · M wand · Ctrl+Z undo · Esc cancel · Ctrl+S save
pp.cropHelp: Drag empty=new · inside=move · corner=resize · RMB/Esc=cancel · Enter=confirm · Shift=square
pp.name: Name
pp.restoreSourceTitle: Overwrite inbox with source and reset layers
pp.canvasSizeHint: Apply writes the source PNG and updates the asset size in the list
pp.canvasSizeInvalid: Canvas width and height must be integers from 32 to 4096
pp.applyUnity: Apply and write to engine file
pp.metaSourceEdit: {w}×{h} · editing source {source} · canvas size applies on save to source
pp.metaUnityEdit: {w}×{h} · editing engine file {unity} · transforms bake on apply
pp.confirmRestore:
Overwrite inbox with source and reset all post-process layers?

source is not modified; current inbox and edits will be lost.
pp.confirmEditSource:
You are editing the source master "{name}".

Changes write to source/ and sync to inbox for compositing. Continue?
pp.sourceChoiceTitle: Editing source directly is not recommended
pp.sourceChoiceMessage: Preview is set to source. Source is the AI master image; post-processing it permanently overwrites the file and cannot be restored with “Restore from source”.
pp.sourceChoiceDetailInbox: Recommended: edit inbox (working copy) instead — you can restore from source anytime
pp.sourceChoiceDetailRestore: If inbox is missing, a copy will be created from source automatically
pp.sourceChoiceDetailSource: Only choose source when you must change the master itself
pp.confirmOpenSourceEdit:
Preview is set to source.

Post-process will modify the source file directly. Changes cannot be undone (except from backup).

Open post-process anyway?
pp.confirmOpenUnityEdit:
Preview is set to the engine export file.

Post-process will modify that file directly. Changes cannot be undone.

Open post-process anyway?
pp.sourceEditWarning: Warning: editing source master directly. Pixel edits are irreversible. Layer settings save on Save / Apply to inbox.
pp.unityEditWarning: Warning: editing the engine export file directly. Pixel edits are irreversible.
pp.matteIntro: Edits the layer PNG alpha directly. Border mode removes outer solid color; eraser mode removes matching color on click or drag.
pp.matteWandHint: Eraser mode: click or hold and drag to remove matching color; Esc to exit.
pp.matteModeBanner: Eraser matte · click or drag matching color
pp.matteModeHint: Eraser matte: click or drag to remove connected matching color
docs.title: ArtPipeline Studio Docs
